title: Botania Seeds
body:
# Botania Seeds

This is an Addon mod for [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) creating growable seeds for all 16 colors of Mystical Flower. It also has several small tweaks to make acquiring Mystical Flowers slightly more difficulty.

This was originally created for the Stardew Valley style modpack [Society: Capital Hill](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/society-capital-hill), however it stands alone as a mod and will be maintained as any other. Any feedback/suggestions are appreciated!
## Features

### Mystical Flower Crops

Every type of Mystical Flower has its own seed crafted using any seed and Minecraft Dyes. These recipes can and should be modified if you plan on gating Botania in a modpack or other setting.

### Botania Tweaks

The following modifications are made to the Base Botania mod to make growing Mystical flowers make sense
- Mystical Flowers and Shimmering Mushrooms no longer spawn in the world (This can be altered using Datapacks)
- Shimmering Mushrooms now require Petals to craft, making them more decorative
- Buried Petals can no longer be bonemealed to grow into Tall Flowers, making infinite Petal duping Impossible.
## Dependencies

This mod has the following dependencies and has been tested with the following versions:

- [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) by vazkii version 447. This mod will *likely* be compatible whenever Botania updates
## Support

Questions? Comments? Suggestions? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/GdcZkrZqkj)!
